notes: All values are from peer-reviewed literature.
Concentration unless stated: ~5 mol% dopant on Co/TM site.
Li/Ni mixing from Rietveld refinement of synchrotron XRD.
Voltage: average discharge voltage vs Li/Li+ at 0.1C, 2.7-4.3 V window.
Lattice parameters: from XRD or neutron diffraction at room temperature.
Undoped NMC811 reference: Li/Ni mixing ~4.5%, voltage ~3.82 V,
UNCERTAINTY FLAG: values marked 'approximate: true' are synthesised from
multiple sources or estimated from trends; verify before final submission.

properties.li_ni_mixing_pct: Li/Ni antisite mixing fraction (%) from Rietveld
